metadata.source_policy: Official AVEVA docs only for official examples; MIT source examples are stored separately under knowledge/examples.

blocked_or_partial.note: Direct Python GET returned HTTP 403; harness fetch_content succeeded for entry page.
Harness fetch returned generic AVEVA Documentation shell for several child pages; full recursive crawl remains a Phase 2 task.

examples.description: PML block if statement pattern used by the diagnostics smoke tests.
examples.code:
IF (!condition) THEN
  -- statements
ELSEIF (!other) THEN
  -- statements
ELSE
  -- statements
ENDIF

examples.description: PML numeric loop pattern.
PML function definition pattern.
examples.code:
DEFINE FUNCTION !!Example(!arg IS STRING) IS STRING
  RETURN !arg
ENDFUNCTION

examples.description: PML form definition pattern.
examples.code:
SETUP FORM !!MyForm DIALOG
  -- gadgets, callbacks, members
EXIT

examples.title: Basic numeric DO loop
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for basic numeric do loop.

examples.title: DO loop with FROM and BY
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for do loop with from and by.
examples.code:
DO !loopCounter FROM 5 TO 10 BY 2
  $P Counter $!loopCounter
ENDDO

examples.title: DO indices iteration
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for do indices iteration.

examples.title: DO values iteration
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for do values iteration.

examples.title: Skip and break in loop
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for skip and break in loop.
examples.code:
DO !i TO 10
  skip if (!i eq 5)
  break if (!i eq 8)
ENDDO

examples.title: IF ELSEIF ELSE block
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for if elseif else block.
examples.code:
IF (!condition) THEN
  $P Yes
ELSEIF (!other) THEN
  $P Other
ELSE
  $P No
ENDIF

examples.title: Generic HANDLE ANY
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for generic handle any.

examples.title: Specific error codes
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for specific error codes.

examples.title: Handle inside loop
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for handle inside loop.
examples.code:
Do !x indices !PIPE
  $!PIPE[$!x]
  PSPEC /A300
  Handle Any
    $p Error on $!PIPE[$!x]
  EndHandle
Enddo

examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for local and global variables.

examples.title: Type declarations
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for type declarations.

examples.code:
VAR !NAME NAME
VAR !POS POS IN WORLD

examples.title: PML2 attribute assignment
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for pml2 attribute assignment.

examples.title: Defined and undefined checks
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for defined and undefined checks.
examples.code:
if defined(!name) then
  $P Name exists
endif
if undefined(!value) then
  !value = |Default|
endif

examples.title: Set and unset methods
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for set and unset methods.
examples.code:
if (!value.set()) then
  $P Set
endif
if (!value.unset()) then
  $P Unset
endif

examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for define form.
examples.code:

examples.title: Setup form
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for setup form.
examples.code:
setup form !!myForm dialog docking right
  title |My Form Title|
exit

examples.title: Frame with toggle
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for frame with toggle.
examples.code:
frame .options width 45
toggle .includeBranches |Include branches| callback |!this.refresh()|
exit

examples.title: Popup menu
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for popup menu.
examples.code:
popup menu .elementPopup
button .goto |Go To| callback |!this.gotoSelected()|
exit

examples.title: Undoable update
examples.description: Extracted and normalized PML pattern for undoable update.
examples.code:
!undo = object UNDOABLE()
!undo.add()
handle any
  :Description = |Updated|
elsehandle
  $P Error: $!!Error.text
endhandle
!undo.endUndoable()
